description: Letter from Ibrāhīm b. Abū l-Surūr to Abū Naṣr b. Abū l-Karam. Concerning medical commodities (ḥawā'ij ʿiṭr). This document is discussed (and incorrectly cited as T-S 13J13.19) in Phillip Ackerman-Lieberman, “Commercial Forms and Legal Norms in the Jewish Community of Medieval Egypt,” Law and History Review, 30:4 (2012), p. 1026. VMR (Information from Goitein's index cards.)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
